Vortice is vortice
fascinating
"One cannot reach dawn except through the dark road"
appears to likely be a translation of the chinese line "除了通过黑夜的道路，人们不能到达黎明。"
which is itself a chinese translation of a line from a poem by Lebanese-American writer and poet Kahlil Gibran
“One may not reach the dawn save by the path of the night.”
oh?
normally they're quite good with referencing the original language texts for their stuff but i guess in this case it may have been too abstract and was missed

I have a lot of time over the summer, so I thought I would log and type out the transcripts for story/events as I read them. I feel like having it somewhere external might make the lore more accessable since I know some people like to pace their own reading speed without being restrained by the game format. I'm thinking google docs as a default, but is there a better site for that? <:Brown_think:1459080117308620996>
